title: Reference Docs deep links broken
body:
Deep links to actions within the API reference are now cleared from the URL and all go to the top.

E.g. https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=latest#tag/containers/operation/ContainerCreateLibpod

Also at the top it has a link to https://podman.io/community/ which seems to be a 404

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

> Also at the top it has a link to https://podman.io/community/ which seems to be a 404

This part seems to be resolved now, though the main part of the ticket is not.
